full_text:
Liu Yang 劉陽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yang (劉陽)was born in Pei. A scholar who tried to kill Cao Cao. After his death at the age of 30, his son required Wang Lang’s protection. Liu Yang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
